description: Cal arrives at Karla Faye Gideon's home, accompanied by Wendell Levi and Francis Noche. He appeals to Karla's resentment towards S.H.I.E.L.D. and offers to free her from the limitations imposed on her hands. After some convincing and having her bracers removed, Karla, overjoyed to regain feeling in her hands with the razor grafts exposed, agrees to join Cal and his crusade against S.H.I.E.L.D.

transcript.line: Then at last, to be told there's no hope. I'm not to see.
Don't say that. You're going to see with my eyes.

Listen, you called me “friend” once. Will you let me think you meant it? Will you let me be hands and eyes to you? Because I've nothing else to do the whole rest of my life but help you see whatever you want to see.
Is this Karla Faye Gideon? Got your name off the gifted index.
Um, I'm... I'm sorry. Are you with S.H.I.E.L.D.?

I'll try not to be offended. We are absolutely not from S.H.I.E.L.D. Show her. Levi, an old buddy of mine. Genius. S.H.I.E.L.D. implanted a chip in his arm. Couldn't get within 100 feet of any tech. I found him holed up in an RV in the Mojave. But now, sans chip, this guy manages to decrypt the index for me. Led me to Francis. Three years, they kept him in a cage. Meds to keep him docile. I know what S.H.I.E.L.D. did to you. How long has it been since you touched someone, since you felt a sensation on your fingertips? We want to free you from these shackles. All you got to do is say that you...

Don't you think it's time everyone learn how S.H.I.E.L.D. treats people like us? We're gonna teach them a lesson, and we want you to join us. I know. I sound bat-guano crazy. Except S.H.I.E.L.D. Nah. Not so mighty anymore. A handful of agents. Director is a door-to-door salesman of a man.
Still, I'm... I'm not powerful myself.
None of us are. But together, we're a force. What do you say?
